jobPostingInfo.title: Retail Sales Specialist - Samsung
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
About the Role

We are seeking a Retail Sales Specialist to represent Samsung products in major retail locations. You will be responsible for driving sales, providing product demonstrations, and delivering exceptional customer experiences.

Responsibilities

  • Drive sales of Samsung products in assigned retail locations
  • Conduct product demonstrations and training sessions
  • Build relationships with store management and associates
  • Report weekly sales metrics and competitive intelligence

Qualifications

  • 2+ years retail sales experience
  • Knowledge of consumer electronics preferred
  • Excellent communication and presentation skills
  • Ability to travel within assigned territory

Compensation

$18.00 - $22.00 per hour plus commission
